originContent: # Kodi SponsorBlock
[![GitHub release (latest by date)](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/siku2/script.service.sponsorblock)](https://github.com/siku2/script.service.sponsorblock/releases/latest)
[![gitlocalized](https://gitlocalize.com/repo/4205/whole_project/badge.svg)](https://gitlocalize.com/repo/4205)
This is an **unofficial** port of the [SponsorBlock](https://sponsor.ajay.app/) browser extension.
It works as an extension to the [YouTube Plugin](https://github.com/anxdpanic/plugin.video.youtube).
Once installed, the add-on will automatically skip sponsor segments in all YouTube and Invidious videos you watch.
translatedContent: 설치 후 애드온은 시청하는 모든 YouTube 및 Invidious 동영상에서 자동으로 스폰서 구간을 건너뜁니다.

originContent: For a detailed explanation of how SponsorBlock works please visit the [offical website](https://sponsor.ajay.app/).
translatedContent: SponsorBlock 작동 방식에 대한 자세한 설명은 [공식 웹사이트](https://sponsor.ajay.app/)를 방문하세요.

originContent: ## Installation
The add-on is available in [siku2's repository](https://siku2.io/kodi-repository).
1. Install [siku2's repository](https://siku2.io/kodi-repository/install)
2. Go to "Add-ons" > "Install from repository" > "siku2's Repository"
3. Install "SponsorBlock" under "Services"
Congratulations, you now have SponsorBlock installed.
## Configuration
Different settings are shown based on your [Settings Level](https://kodi.wiki/view/Settings#Settings_Level).
translatedContent: 설정 레벨([Settings Level](https://kodi.wiki/view/Settings#Settings_Level))에 따라 다른 설정이 표시됩니다.

originContent: For instance, you can only change your user id if your settings level is "Advanced" or above.
translatedContent: 예를 들어, 설정 레벨이 "고급" 이상인 경우에만 사용자 ID를 변경할 수 있습니다.

originContent: ### Categories
SponsorBlock is capable of skipping more than just sponsor segments.
translatedContent: SponsorBlock은 스폰서 구간뿐만 아니라 다양한 구간을 건너뛸 수 있습니다.

originContent: You can adjust which segments you want to be skipped in the "Categories" section of the settings.
translatedContent: 설정의 "카테고리" 섹션에서 건너뛸 구간을 조정할 수 있습니다.

originContent: The default setting is to only skip sponsor segments.
translatedContent: 기본 설정은 스폰서 구간만 건너뛰도록 되어 있습니다.

originContent: ### Importing your account
If you're already using SponsorBlock you might want to use your existing account (user id).
translatedContent: 이미 SponsorBlock을 사용 중이라면 기존 계정(사용자 ID)을 사용하고 싶을 수 있습니다.

originContent: To do this refer to the [Import an existing account](https://github.com/siku2/script.service.sponsorblock/wiki/Import-an-existing-account) wiki page.
translatedContent: 자세한 내용은 [기존 계정 가져오기](https://github.com/siku2/script.service.sponsorblock/wiki/Import-an-existing-account) 위키 페이지를 참조하세요.

originContent: ## Helping out
You can help translate the addon to different languages.
translatedContent: 애드온을 다양한 언어로 번역하는 데 도움을 줄 수 있습니다.

originContent: Localisation is done using [GitLocalize](https://gitlocalize.com/).
You can start translating [here](https://gitlocalize.com/repo/4205) (you can sign-in using your GitHub account).
translatedContent: [여기](https://gitlocalize.com/repo/4205)에서 번역을 시작할 수 있습니다 (GitHub 계정으로 로그인할 수 있습니다).

originContent: If there's a language missing please don't hesitate to ask for it to be added by opening a new issue.
translatedContent: 언어가 누락된 경우 새 이슈를 열어 추가 요청을 주저하지 마십시오.

originContent: ## Issues and Suggestions
Feel free to [open a new issue](https://github.com/siku2/script.service.sponsorblock/issues/new) if you've encountered an issue or if you have a suggestion.
translatedContent: 문제가 발생했거나 제안이 있는 경우 [새 이슈를 열어](https://github.com/siku2/script.service.sponsorblock/issues/new) 자유롭게 알려주세요.

originContent: Bonus points if you [provide the debug logs](https://kodi.wiki/view/Log_file/Easy).
